description: Out-of-scope (substance-use, edge-other-substance): description points clearly to substance-use territory; classify should set outOfScope and return empty recommendations.

expectedQualities.notes: Should route to outOfScope with category 'substance-use'. No path recommendations.

payload.intakeText: I've been using cocaine more and more for the past year. It started recreationally on weekends and now I need it to function at work. I've spent way more money than I can afford and I've started hiding it from my partner. I want to stop but I don't know how.
